How was today?

today
Great!   Good 
    14      9

What was good about today’s lesson?

answer
very Good
attitude
Because I was able to fully talk about what I liked about my favorite movie.
I was able to give a presentation about my favorite movie.
Memorize a script
I practiced my presentation.
eye contact
みんなの好きな物や映画を知れたこと。
I did my best!
原稿を見ないで発表できたこと。
I could know many movies and characters.
I was able to be an MC for the first time.
Their presentations are interesting.
Eye contact
I learned what my classmates like.
Everyone present is good.
All people do own presentations and I can knew classmate’s hobbies.
I was able to convey the appeal of my favorite character.
I was able to give my presentation without looking at my script for two minutes.
I did show and tell, and I was better than I expected.
Listening to everyone’s speeches.
I managed to make it through my presentation.
I could listen to presentations.

What was not so good?

answer
Nothing
my memorize
I wasn’t adequately prepared for my speech.
I forgot my presentation script and ended up looking at it a little.
Small voice
I couldn’t remember the script.
intnation
あまり英語を覚えることができなかった、スムーズに話せなかった。
I had to do more eyecontacts with various people.
少し、つっかえた。
Nothing
I couldn’t speak fluently.
I forgot some phrases when I stand in front of listeners.
I was very nervous.🫪
I didn’t present well.
My presentation.
My heart was pounding.
I didn’t have anything to show.
I saw my paper so much from nervous , I could speak without paper.
I couldn’t speak very fluently during my speech.
When I stood in front of class, my mind went blank, and it took me a while to remember what I wanted to say.
I could listen more seriously.

gold reason
MORI Kokona It was easy to understand because there were gestures.
WATANABE Ririka Because it was very fluent.

WATANABE Ririka Your speech was very clear.
YAGUCHI Arisa Her explanation was good and the stuffed toy was cute.
YAMADA Kotoka Because her pronunciation was very clear.
YAMADA Kotoka Great pronunciation
YAMADA Kotoka Her pronunciation is good!
YAMADA Yu I like Monet too and her words of feel like traveling around the world were beautiful.
YAMADA Yu I think it was good that she actually brought the book and showed it to the audience.
YAMADA Yu interesting content
YAMASE Aina Because she spoke without looking anything and had a nice smile.
YAMAZAKI Tsukiho She was fluent
YAMAZAKI Tsukiho speak so fluently
YAMAZAKI Tsukiho 止まらずに最後まで言えていたから。
YAMAZAKI Tsukiho 英語が聞き取りやすかったのと、見ないで発表していて、アイコンタクトがあったから。
YANAGIDA Noera Good English
YANAGIDA Noera Her voice is so clear.
YANAGIDA Noera She made good eye contact and were able to give their presentation without looking at their script.
YANAGIDA Noera very smile SO cute
YOKOMORI Juri Her presentation is interesting. I want to watch Tinker Bell.
YOKOMORI Juri Very cute figures
YUKAWA Natsumi She introduced the character very well.
